code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut current = 0
mut has_digit = false
mut sign = 1

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_space
    if has_digit
      nums = list.push(nums, current * sign)
      current = 0
      has_digit = false
      sign = 1
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
  else if b == 43
    sign = 1
  else
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digit = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut cur_max = 0
let len = list.len(nums)
mut j = 0
while j < len
  let v = match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    cur_max = v
  else if v > cur_max
    cur_max = v
  end
  maxes = list.push(maxes, cur_max)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let mlen = list.len(maxes)
while k < mlen
  let v = match list.get(maxes, k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(out)
